channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: World Cup Freddy visits more iconic American locations and enters the 'Burger Wars'
DOJ expands crackdown on fraudulent citizenship
item.description: The Trump administration is planning a major increase in efforts to revoke U.S. citizenship from naturalized Americans accused of obtaining it through...

item.title: To get a utilities contract in California, be ready to prove your sexual orientation
Top Senate Republican criticizes Trump's Iran deal, says $300 billion makes Obama deal seem minor
item.description: Senate Armed Services Chair Roger Wicker argues the Iran deal undermines U.S. gains, noting the $300 billion fund surpasses Obama's 2015 agreement.
